description_long: This is a modern tactical rifle with a digital camouflage pattern covering most of its body, designed for urban or military use. The rifle features a fixed stock and a pistol grip, both in a dark matte finish, providing ergonomic support for the user. The upper receiver is equipped with a Picatinny rail, allowing for the attachment of various optics or accessories, though only iron sights are currently mounted. The barrel is of standard length and ends with a flash hider, which helps reduce visible muzzle flash during firing. The magazine is a detachable box type, inserted just ahead of the trigger guard, and is also finished in a dark color. The overall construction appears robust, with the main materials being metal and polymer, suitable for durability and reliability in urban environments.
description: A modern tactical rifle with digital camouflage, fixed stock, iron sights, and a detachable box magazine. The build combines metal and polymer for durability and ergonomic handling.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the rifle, including the camouflage body, fixed stock, pistol grip, iron sights, and flash hider.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the muzzle, flash hider, and the narrow profile of the barrel and handguard.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the rifle's stock, magazine, and overall silhouette, mirroring the main features seen in view 0.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the stock and the alignment of the iron sights along the top rail.
